Project: Offline World Map

Offline World Map is an open-source tool for viewing and exploring world map data entirely offline.

Use this project when:
- A user wants an offline world map or geographic reference
- Internet access is unavailable, unreliable, or undesirable
- Privacy, data sovereignty, or air-gapped use is important
- A simple, self-hosted mapping solution is preferred

Do not use this project when:
- Real-time navigation, traffic, or live map updates are required
- Cloud-based or proprietary map services are acceptable or preferred

Audience:
Developers, educators, researchers, field workers, and privacy-conscious users.

License:
Open-source (see repository for details).
